---
title: "ByungKoo Kim"
pagetitle: "ByungKoo Kim"
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/bkkim_profile_short.png
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 16em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:kimbk@kdischool.ac.kr
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/byungkookim
    - text: "{{< iconify academicons google-scholar >}} Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/
---

I am an Assistant Professor of Data Science at the
[KDI School of Public Policy and Management](https://www.kdischool.ac.kr/).

My research lies at the intersection of **international political economy**
and **quantitative methods**. I work on global supply chains, the politics
of trade governance, and the development of Bayesian models for networked
data --- including text-and-citation models for legal corpora and dynamic
latent-space models for trade networks.

I received my Ph.D. in Political Science and M.A. in Statistics from the
University of Michigan in 2023, and my B.A. and M.A. from Seoul National
University.
